_comment: Nomad parameterized job that dispatches ONE persistent drain executor for the datacenter LEASE path (the Nomad analogue of mekhan-lease-executor.sh). Unlike petri-executor-worker (PerJob, MAX_JOBS=1, one-shot via EXECUTOR_TARGET_EXEC_ID), this is Pool/drain: NO EXECUTOR_TARGET_EXEC_ID, so the executor opens a durable shared consumer on the {ns}_{prio} stream with a wildcard {ns}.{prio}.> filter and pulls EVERY job the leased loop enqueues to the lease-scoped namespace. The lease params (namespace + cap + idle) ride as dispatch Meta and are surfaced to the task env via ${NOMAD_META_*}. Release = nomad job stop → SIGTERM → graceful 30s drain → exit. NomadAllocatorClient::acquire dispatches this (job id 'petri-lease-executor', overridable via NOMAD_LEASE_JOB_TEMPLATE); the dispatched child job id becomes the lease alloc_id.
